release_label: Surface Cleanup and Cutover Tranche SON-402 2026-04-03

notes: This bundle captures SON-402 tranche 1 by making Execution, Judgment, and Learning the canonical operator workbench surfaces while retaining raw Acceptance as a compatibility bridge.
Legacy mission acceptance deep links now normalize onto Judgment, the Acceptance mission tab has been removed, and Judgment Workbench exposes an explicit raw acceptance artifact route.

Source-run compare versus learning-workbench-tranche-son-396-2026-04-03: issue_start stayed on SPC-1; mission_start advanced to fresh-acpx-20260403054744-924ad5; exploratory advanced to fresh-acpx-20260403055337-dde207.

A tranche-closeout harness bug in the fresh mission workflow replay was repaired by migrating campaign routes and tab interactions from acceptance to judgment; the final reruns closed with 0 harness_bug / 0 n2n_bug / 0 ux_gap.
